task.title: Creating and configuring the IPVLAN device using iproute2

context.p: This procedure shows how to set up the IPVLAN device using iproute2.

step.cmd: To create an IPVLAN device, enter the following command:

info.codeblock: # ip link add link <real_nic_device> name <ipvlan_device> type ipvlan mode l2
info.p: Note that network interface controller (NIC) is a hardware component which connects a computer to a network.

step.cmd: To assign an IPv4 or IPv6 address to the interface, enter the following command:
In case of configuring an IPVLAN device in L3 mode or L3S mode, make the following setups:

li.p: Configure the neighbor setup for the remote peer on the remote host:
where MAC_address is the MAC address of the real NIC on which an IPVLAN device is based on.
Configure an IPVLAN device for L3 mode with the following command:
where IP-address represents the address of the remote peer.

step.cmd: To set an IPVLAN device active, enter the following command:
To check if the IPVLAN device is active, execute the following command on the remote host:

info.p: where the IP_address uses the IP address of the IPVLAN device.
